name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for AfriWage
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions? Why did you rule them out?

## User Story

As a [employer / worker / developer], I want to [do something] so that [benefit].

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context

Any mockups, links, or other context that would help.
